name: Israel
headline: Israel FLOOR-STATE CONFIRMATION at 0.0 / Critical. May 17 assessment carry-forward; new conduct documentation: HRW May 15-16 documented airstrikes (62 Palestinian civilians killed, post-prior-assessment). Amnesty May 2026 high-rise destruction report (war crimes of wanton destruction + collective punishment). Total Gaza blockade ongoing March-May 2026. 75,811 total killed; 73,770+ Palestinians. OHCHR February 2026 ethnic cleansing concern report. Aid ban on 37 NGOs sustained since December 2025. Floor sustained; no score change.

ACT.rationale: Floor sustained. AC1 responsiveness: aid-ban on 37 NGOs prevents identified-need response.

EQU.rationale: Floor sustained. OHCHR ethnic cleansing concern report (February 2026) is canonical EQU-floor evidence.

BND.rationale: Floor sustained. Amnesty high-rise destruction report (May 2026) — war crimes of wanton destruction + collective punishment.

INT.rationale: Floor sustained. Killings and destruction continue despite October 2025 ceasefire.

evidence.finding: Systematic destruction of high-rise buildings documented as war crimes of wanton destruction and collective punishment.
Ethnic cleansing concerns in Gaza and West Bank amid intensified violence (February 2026).
UN: killings and destruction continuing despite October 2025 ceasefire.
HRW documented airstrikes May 10, 15, 16 with 62 Palestinian civilians killed in targeted strikes. May 15-16 events are post-prior-assessment.

rationale: Floor confirmation at 0.0.
